shorts.headline: AI to End Coding as We Know It?
shorts.narration: Could AI spell the end for human coders? Tech journalist Clive Thompson interviewed 70+ devs at top firms for his explosive article 'Coding After Coders.' The future of programming might look very different. Follow for daily AI updates!

shorts.headline: Wall Street Bets Big on Broadcom’s AI Chips
shorts.narration: Broadcom (AVGO) is soaring as Wall Street predicts $100+ billion in AI chip sales. Investors are all in—could this be the next big play in the AI boom? Follow for daily AI updates!

shorts.headline: Deep-Sea Proteins Supercharge Medical Tests
shorts.narration: Scientists found ultra-tough DNA-binding proteins in volcanic lakes and deep-sea vents. These could revolutionize disease testing—nature’s secrets unlocking medical breakthroughs! Follow for daily AI updates!

shorts.headline: Kernel Anti-Cheat: Gaming’s Secret Weapon
shorts.narration: Modern anti-cheat systems are some of the most advanced software on your PC, operating at the highest privilege level. Cheaters, beware—the tech is watching! Follow for daily AI updates!

shorts.headline: Iran’s Space Centre Hit in Strikes
shorts.narration: Video shows heavy damage at Iran’s Space Research Centre after Israeli-US strikes. The fallout could reshape regional tech and defense. Follow for daily AI updates!

shorts.headline: Samsung Browser Gets AI Upgrade
shorts.narration: Samsung Browser is leveling up with multitasking and AI features in One UI 9. Chrome’s dominance might finally face a real challenger! Follow for daily AI updates!

shorts.headline: Meta Delays AI Model Over Performance Issues
shorts.narration: Meta hit pause on its new AI model after concerns—its only release so far is Vibes, a Sora-like video app. Is the AI race getting too fast? Follow for daily AI updates!

shorts.headline: Fed Holds Rates as Iran War Roils Markets
shorts.narration: The US Fed is expected to keep rates steady amid Iran war chaos. Oil prices and economic uncertainty are forcing a cautious stance. Follow for daily AI updates!

shorts.headline: Open-Source Tool Boosts NVIDIA GPU Power
shorts.narration: GreenBoost, an open-source Linux tool, supercharges NVIDIA GPUs by using system RAM and NVMe storage. Bigger AI models just got more accessible! Follow for daily AI updates!

long_video.headline: AI’s Threat to Traditional Coding Jobs
long_video.narration: Tech journalist Clive Thompson’s explosive article 'Coding After Coders' reveals AI’s growing role in software development. After interviewing 70+ devs at Google, Amazon, and more, he predicts a seismic shift—could AI make human coders obsolete? The debate is heating up!

long_video.headline: Broadcom’s $100B AI Chip Dream
long_video.narration: Wall Street is buzzing over Broadcom’s (AVGO) AI chip potential, with forecasts topping $100 billion in sales. As demand for AI hardware skyrockets, could this be the next NVIDIA? Investors are betting big.

long_video.headline: The Science Behind Kernel Anti-Cheat
long_video.narration: Modern kernel anti-cheat systems are marvels of software engineering, operating at the highest privilege level to stop hackers. From intercepting kernel calls to deep system scans, these tools are gaming’s last line of defense.

long_video.headline: Extreme Proteins Revolutionize Medicine
long_video.narration: Scientists discovered ultra-stable DNA-binding proteins in deep-sea vents and volcanic lakes. These heat-resistant molecules could transform disease testing, offering new hope for faster, more reliable diagnostics.

long_video.headline: Fallout from Iran’s Space Centre Strike
long_video.narration: New footage shows severe damage at Iran’s Space Research Centre after Israeli-US strikes. The attack could delay Tehran’s space ambitions and escalate tech tensions in the region.

long_video.headline: Samsung Browser’s AI-Powered Future
long_video.narration: Samsung Browser is getting a major upgrade with One UI 9, adding AI features and multitasking. With Chrome dominating the market, can Samsung’s innovations carve out a new niche?

long_video.headline: Meta’s AI Struggles: Vibes and Delays
long_video.narration: Meta delayed its new AI model over performance concerns, leaving Vibes—its Sora-like video app—as its sole release. Is the company falling behind in the AI race?

long_video.headline: Fed’s Rate Dilemma Amid Iran Conflict
long_video.narration: The US Fed is expected to hold rates steady as the Iran war disrupts markets. With oil prices volatile and growth slowing, policymakers face a tough balancing act.

long_video.headline: GreenBoost: NVIDIA’s Open-Source Boost
long_video.narration: The open-source GreenBoost tool enhances NVIDIA GPUs by tapping into system RAM and NVMe storage. This could democratize access to larger AI models, shaking up the tech landscape.

long_video.headline: Delhi Court Upholds Job Termination Post-Brain Tumor
long_video.narration: The Delhi High Court ruled against a former director seeking a 3-year leave after brain tumor surgery, citing no legal right. The case sparks debate over employee rights and health accommodations.
